scripts.wiki:copy: rm -rf src/content/wiki && mkdir -p src/content && cp -r ../wiki src/content/wiki
scripts.blog:copy: rm -rf src/content/blog && mkdir -p src/content && cp -r ../blog src/content/blog
scripts.crosswalk:copy: rm -rf src/content/crosswalk && mkdir -p src/content/crosswalk && cp ../crosswalk-data/*.json src/content/crosswalk/
scripts.tree:copy: rm -rf src/content/tree && mkdir -p src/content/tree && cp ../tree-data/*.json src/content/tree/
scripts.predev: npm run wiki:copy && npm run blog:copy && npm run crosswalk:copy && npm run tree:copy
scripts.prebuild: npm run wiki:copy && npm run blog:copy && npm run crosswalk:copy && npm run tree:copy
scripts.types:gen: cd .. && python3 scripts/export_openapi.py frontend/openapi.json && cd frontend && openapi-typescript openapi.json -o src/lib/api-types.ts && rm openapi.json
